# Cira — AI Health Nurse

> Cira is an AI health nurse for symptom guidance and camera-based vital sign scans (heart rate, blood pressure, breathing rate, HRV, stress). Chat is free and works without an account; vital scans run on-device using the Shen AI SDK.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Cira, what it does, and how to start a chat or scan.
- [Free AI Chat](/free-chat): Free AI nurse chat, no signup required.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of the chat and vital scan flow.
- [Technology](/technology): How the rPPG/rBCG vital scan and clinical models work.
- [What Cira Helps With](/what-cira-helps-with): Scenarios where Cira can guide you (symptom triage, second opinions, daily wellness).
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free tier plus paid plans for chat credits and additional scans.
- [Real Doctors](/real-doctors): Directory of licensed doctors in the Cira network.
- [Our Story](/our-story): Founder story behind Cira and the Bangkok origins.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on AI health, vital signs, and preventive care.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to save chats, reports, and scan history.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How Cira handles health data (on-device processing, no uploads of raw video).
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
